title: Adaptive photo-first NIS production release
why: Довести регистрацию нового ученика до полноценного адаптивного обучения: карта экзамена, диагностика, персональный маршрут, photo-first самостоятельное решение и guided-разбор только по явному запросу.
summary: Exact linux/amd64 r13 прошёл source gates, visual benchmark, 80-state render matrix и живой CJM с реальным Gemini локально и через публичный production URL; image-only cutover выполнен с rollback tag и сохранением persistent данных.
result: Production доступен на https://observer-terrorists-reputation-chosen.trycloudflare.com; регистрация, адаптация, диагностика, разные персональные маршруты, exact resume, unreadable/incorrect/correct photo verdicts и mastery после 3/4 самостоятельных решений подтверждены end-to-end.
next_step: Провести первую наблюдаемую учебную сессию с реальным учеником и сравнить его затруднения с зафиксированным production CJM.
verification: Flutter Chrome/core tests and flutter build web --release: PASS
state_matrix_gate.py against exact r13: PASS, 40 states and 80 screenshots
live_cjm_gate.py against exact r13 with real Gemini: PASS, 2 accounts and 19 screenshots
state_matrix_gate.py against public production: PASS, 40 states and 80 screenshots
live_cjm_gate.py against public production with real Gemini: PASS, no console/page/request/API errors
production SQL invariants: 0 duplicate idempotency keys and 0 orphan journeys
blind release review: READY without P0/P1/P2
visual benchmark: READY, 8.95/10, wow=true, critical flags=0

docs.reason: Journey API/core, exact-once submissions, mastery semantics and production verification surfaces are documented.

learning.reason: Candidates 20260716T190904Z-1874a2 and 20260716T191112Z-638593 added verified buildx save/load identity guidance and the wrap learning.status contract under standing consent.

memory.reason: No memory mutation requested; durable product state is stored in project docs and evidence.

summary: Adaptive photo-first NIS journey deployed as exact linux/amd64 r13.
Production CJM passed with two new accounts, different routes and real Gemini photo grading.
Mastery requires 3/4 independent solutions; guided help does not count.
Rollback image retained and persistent DB/photo data preserved.
Public quick tunnel URL is temporary and changes when kodi-tunnel restarts.
vault.reason: Store a compact release handoff only if the kodi-web vault mapping exists.

graphify.reason: Refresh only if this repository already owns a graphify artifact.

git.reason: The worktree contains broad pre-existing user changes and the user did not request a commit.
